fund_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
nav:
HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 09 Dec 1999. Chirag Setalvad is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹8,54,364 Cr and the Latest  as of 17 Apr 2026 is ₹220.06.
The HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year.
...Read more

fund_name: Motilal Oswal Large and Midcap Fund Direct Growth
nav:
Motilal Oswal Large and Midcap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Motilal Oswal Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 28 Dec 2009. Swapnil P Mayekar is the Current Fund Manager of Motilal Oswal Large and Midcap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹1,24,826 Cr and the Latest  as of 17 Apr 2026 is ₹37.66.
The Motilal Oswal Large and Midcap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹500. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 365 days.
